'''Redstar''' was a [[Yaka]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who preyed on [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] shipping lanes in his ship, ''[[Night Lady]]'', between the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. He was captured by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Lowbacca]] and put on trial by the Galactic Alliance at the maximum security [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[MaxSec Eight]].<ref name="DNI: TJK">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref>

On a chest-plate that he wore was engraved a skull of an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
